fullDescription.text: User-controlled data reaches a SQL query without parameterization

help.text: Use prepared statements with bound parameters. Never concatenate user input into SQL.
help.markdown: Use prepared statements with bound parameters. Never concatenate user input into SQL.

fullDescription.text: User-controlled data rendered in HTML output without encoding

help.text: Store secrets in environment variables or a secrets manager.
help.markdown: Store secrets in environment variables or a secrets manager.

fullDescription.text: User-controlled data determines target of server-side HTTP requests

help.text: Validate and whitelist hostnames. Block internal/private IP ranges.
help.markdown: Validate and whitelist hostnames. Block internal/private IP ranges.

fullDescription.text: User-controlled data in HTTP redirect location

help.text: Validate redirect URL against a whitelist of trusted domains.
help.markdown: Validate redirect URL against a whitelist of trusted domains.

fullDescription.text: File upload without proper type/size/content validation

help.text: Validate MIME type, extension (whitelist), and size. Store outside webroot.
help.markdown: Validate MIME type, extension (whitelist), and size. Store outside webroot.

fullDescription.text: User-controlled data executed as PHP code

help.text: Never pass user input to code execution functions. Use preg_replace_callback() instead of /e modifier.
help.markdown: Never pass user input to code execution functions. Use preg_replace_callback() instead of /e modifier.

fullDescription.text: XML parsing without disabling external entity loading
User-controlled data in filesystem operations allows directory traversal

help.text: Use basename() and validate with realpath() against allowed directories.
help.markdown: Use basename() and validate with realpath() against allowed directories.

shortDescription.text: MD5 used for hashing (weak for passwords)

fullDescription.text: MD5 used for hashing (weak for passwords)

help.text: Use password_hash()/password_verify() for passwords. Use random_bytes() for randomness.
help.markdown: Use password_hash()/password_verify() for passwords. Use random_bytes() for randomness.

fullDescription.text: User-controlled data reaches OS command execution

help.text: Avoid passing user input to OS commands. Use escapeshellarg() if unavoidable.
help.markdown: Avoid passing user input to OS commands. Use escapeshellarg() if unavoidable.

fullDescription.text: Session ID set from user-controlled input

help.text: Never set session_id() from user input. Call session_regenerate_id(true) after auth.
help.markdown: Never set session_id() from user input. Call session_regenerate_id(true) after auth.

fullDescription.text: User-controlled data in LDAP queries without escaping

help.text: Use ldap_escape() on all user input in LDAP filters.
help.markdown: Use ldap_escape() on all user input in LDAP filters.

fullDescription.text: User-controlled data determines included file path (LFI/RFI)

help.text: Use a whitelist of allowed files. Never include user-controlled paths.
help.markdown: Use a whitelist of allowed files. Never include user-controlled paths.

help.text: Use json_decode() instead. If unserialize needed, use allowed_classes option.
help.markdown: Use json_decode() instead. If unserialize needed, use allowed_classes option.
